code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Logistics_Warehouse] --> Draft: Create feature
    
    Draft --> Active: Validate & Deploy
    Draft --> [Logistics_FleetManagement]: Discard
    
    Active --> Deprecated: Mark as deprecated
    Active --> Active: Update version
    
    Deprecated --> Archived: After transition period
    Deprecated --> Active: Reactivate
    
    Archived --> [Logistics_StockLevel]: Delete metadata
    
    note right of Draft
        Status: DRAFT
        - Feature in development
        - Not used in production
        - Can be modified freely
    end note
    
    note right of Active
        Status: ACTIVE
        - Feature in production use
        - Immutable (Logistics_StockLevel)
        - Monitored and maintained
    end note
    
    note right of Deprecated
        Status: DEPRECATED
        - Still available but discouraged
        - Documentation shows replacement
        - Transition period (Logistics_DeliveryRoute)
    end note
    
    note right of Archived
        Status: ARCHIVED
        - No longer available
        - Metadata kept for historical reference
        - Can be purged after retention period
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为物流仓储系统的功能生命周期画一个状态图。核心是从Logistics_Warehouse创建新功能开始，经过几个关键状态流转。
明白，所以起点是Logistics_Warehouse，第一个状态是Draft。那Draft之后有哪些分支？是直接到Active，还是有其他可能？
Draft有两个去向：验证通过就进入Active，如果废弃了可以退回Logistics_FleetManagement处理。另外Active状态本身支持版本更新，这个要画成自循环。
好的，Draft到Active是"Validate & Deploy"，废弃分支是到Logistics_FleetManagement，Active的自循环标记为"Update version"。那Active之后呢？
Active功能可能被标记为Deprecated，这个状态比较特殊——它有过渡期，参考Logistics_DeliveryRoute的时间窗口，之后进入Archived；但也可以重新激活回Active。
确认一下：Deprecated到Archived是"After transition period"，反向是"Reactivate"。Archived是终态吗？
Archived不是完全终态，元数据会保留，但可以通过Logistics_StockLevel清理。另外每个状态我需要加注释说明：Draft是可自由修改的开发态，Active对接Logistics_StockLevel且不可变，Deprecated仍可用但不推荐，Archived保留历史记录。

已完成。四个状态的注释都加上了：Draft标注了not used in production和can be modified；Active强调immutable和monitored；Deprecated说明still available和documentation；Archived注明metadata kept和can be purged。Archived到Logistics_StockLevel的清理路径也画好了。
